requirement_topic.en: SISO Market Entry and Standards Confirmation

summary.en: The Solomon Islands national standards body context is limited in public charger-specific sources and should be flagged honestly. A charger-specific mandatory whole-unit certification route through SISO could not be confirmed from the provided research facts as of 2026-06-14. Importers should still confirm whether any compulsory standard, electrical safety, consumer protection, customs, radio, telecommunications, metering, or labeling requirement applies to the exact EV charger configuration.
summary.zh: 所罗门群岛国家标准机构相关公开充电桩专门资料有限，应如实标注不确定性。截至2026年6月14日，依据所给研究事实未能确认通过SISO适用于充电桩整机的专门强制认证路径。进口商仍应确认具体充电桩配置是否适用任何强制标准、电气安全、消费者保护、海关、无线电、通信、计量或标签要求。
summary.zht: 索羅門群島國家標準機構相關公開充電樁專門資料有限，應如實標註不確定性。截至2026年6月14日，依據所給研究事實未能確認通過SISO適用於充電樁整機的專門強制認證路徑。進口商仍應確認具體充電樁配置是否適用任何強制標準、電氣安全、消費者保護、海關、無線電、通訊、計量或標籤要求。

standards_or_laws: Solomon Islands Standards Organisation (SISO) standards context where applicable
Solomon Islands customs and import requirements
Product-specific electrical, radio, telecommunications, metering, and labeling requirements where applicable
Project-specific Solomon Power / SIEA, donor, utility, or site-owner requirements

summary.en: China domestic EV chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234, and GB/T 27930, with China conformity routes depending on product scope. China GB/T evidence can support engineering review but does not establish Solomon Islands market-entry status or project approval.
summary.zh: 中国国内电动汽车充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930准备文件，具体中国合格评定路径取决于产品范围。中国GB/T证据可支持工程审查，但不能证明已满足所罗门群岛市场准入或项目审批要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內電動汽車充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930準備文件，具體中國合格評定路徑取決於產品範圍。中國GB/T證據可支持工程審查，但不能證明已滿足索羅門群島市場准入或項目審批要求。

standards_or_laws: China product conformity requirements where in scope

gap.en: Before shipment, map the importer of record, HS code, charger power rating, radio or cellular modules, metering functions, IEC safety and EMC evidence, English labeling, spare parts, warranty support, sea-freight route through Honiara, and installation responsibility. Confirm requirements with SISO, customs, Solomon Power / SIEA, and the site owner or project engineer where relevant.
gap.zh: 出货前，应梳理记录进口商、HS编码、充电桩功率等级、无线或蜂窝模块、计量功能、IEC安全及EMC证据、英文标签、备件、质保支持、经霍尼亚拉的海运路径和安装责任。应按相关性向SISO、海关、Solomon Power / SIEA以及场站业主或项目工程师确认要求。
gap.zht: 出貨前，應梳理記錄進口商、HS編碼、充電樁功率等級、無線或蜂窩模組、計量功能、IEC安全及EMC證據、英文標籤、備件、質保支持、經霍尼亞拉的海運路徑和安裝責任。應按相關性向SISO、海關、Solomon Power / SIEA以及場站業主或項目工程師確認要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — exact mandatory route depends on product configuration, HS code, project use, electrical installation, radio functions, and current Solomon Islands requirements
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T or China conformity evidence is not a Solomon Islands market-entry substitute

source.publisher: Solomon Islands Ministry of Commerce, Industry, Labour and Immigration

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim Solomon Islands market access from China GB/T documents alone. Confirm SISO, customs, Solomon Power / SIEA, radio, metering, and project-owner requirements for the exact charger before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国GB/T文件宣称满足所罗门群岛市场准入。出货前应针对具体充电桩确认SISO、海关、Solomon Power / SIEA、无线电、计量及项目业主要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國GB/T文件宣稱滿足索羅門群島市場准入。出貨前應針對具體充電樁確認SISO、海關、Solomon Power / SIEA、無線電、計量及項目業主要求。

requirement_topic.en: Nascent EV Market — Pacific SIDS, BRI, Hydro, Solar, and Low Electrification Context
requirement_topic.zh: 早期电动汽车市场——太平洋小岛屿发展中国家、共建“一带一路”、水电、光伏及低电气化背景
requirement_topic.zht: 早期電動汽車市場——太平洋小島嶼發展中國家、共建「一帶一路」、水電、光伏及低電氣化背景

summary.en: Solomon Islands EV charging demand is essentially non-existent or very early-stage compared with mature EV markets. Early opportunities are more likely to come from donor-funded infrastructure, government or utility pilots, fleet use, ports, resorts, aid or BRI-linked projects, and energy-transition programmes connected to Tina River hydro and solar expansion than from a dense national public charging network. Low electrification, island geography, cyclone exposure, high humidity, salt mist, and Honiara-centered sea-freight logistics make project engineering and after-sales support central to feasibility.
summary.zh: 与成熟电动汽车市场相比，所罗门群岛电动汽车充电需求基本不存在或仍处非常早期。早期机会更可能来自援助资金基础设施、政府或公用事业试点、车队、港口、度假设施、援助或共建“一带一路”相关项目，以及与Tina River水电和光伏扩张相关的能源转型计划，而不是密集全国公共充电网络。低电气化、岛屿地理、气旋暴露、高湿、盐雾和以霍尼亚拉为中心的海运物流，使项目工程和售后支持成为可行性的核心。
summary.zht: 與成熟電動汽車市場相比，索羅門群島電動汽車充電需求基本不存在或仍處非常早期。早期機會更可能來自援助資金基礎設施、政府或公用事業試點、車隊、港口、度假設施、援助或共建「一帶一路」相關項目，以及與Tina River水電和光伏擴張相關的能源轉型計劃，而不是密集全國公共充電網絡。低電氣化、島嶼地理、氣旋暴露、高濕、鹽霧和以霍尼亞拉為中心的海運物流，使項目工程和售後支持成為可行性的核心。

standards_or_laws: Solomon Power / SIEA or site-owner power-system requirements
IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 / IEC 61000 evidence where specified
Donor, utility, port, resort, fleet, or energy-transition project technical specifications

summary.en: China's large domestic EV charging ecosystem is built around high-volume urban and highway deployments with GB/T connectors and domestic service networks. Those assumptions do not automatically translate to Solomon Islands, where project-specific engineering, spare parts, training, remote maintenance, marine corrosion control, and shipping lead time can be more important than catalog conformity claims.
summary.zh: 中国大规模国内电动汽车充电生态主要围绕城市和高速部署、GB/T接口及国内服务网络建立。这些假设不能自动转化到所罗门群岛；在当地，项目特定工程、备件、培训、远程维护、海洋腐蚀控制和运输周期可能比目录式合规声明更重要。
summary.zht: 中國大規模國內電動汽車充電生態主要圍繞城市和高速部署、GB/T接口及國內服務網絡建立。這些假設不能自動轉化到索羅門群島；在當地，項目特定工程、備件、培訓、遠程維護、海洋腐蝕控制和運輸周期可能比目錄式合規聲明更重要。

standards_or_laws: China operator service and maintenance practices

gap.en: Build the offer around project engineering: climate and salt-mist review, cyclone anchoring, weak-grid and solar-hybrid compatibility, training, spare modules, remote diagnostics, English documentation, installation supervision, warranty response, and life-cycle maintenance. This market context does not waive IEC, connector, grid, or market-entry checks.
gap.zh: 方案应围绕项目工程构建：气候和盐雾审查、气旋锚固、弱电网及光伏混合兼容性、培训、备件模块、远程诊断、英文文件、安装监督、质保响应及全生命周期维护。该市场背景并不免除IEC、接口、电网或市场准入核查。
gap.zht: 方案應圍繞項目工程構建：氣候和鹽霧審查、氣旋錨固、弱電網及光伏混合兼容性、培訓、備件模組、遠程診斷、英文文件、安裝監督、質保響應及全生命周期維護。該市場背景並不免除IEC、接口、電網或市場准入核查。

mandatory_status.target: Commercially critical — often project-specified rather than a single national charger rule; requirements become mandatory when written into tender, contract, donor, insurer, utility, or site-owner specifications
mandatory_status.cn: China deployment scale and domestic service assumptions do not satisfy Solomon Islands project requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Solomon Islands EV charger opportunities should be treated as engineered pilot or infrastructure projects, not plug-and-play catalog exports. Confirm site power, connector, IEC evidence, marine durability, maintenance, logistics, and local responsibility before accepting an order.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 所罗门群岛电动汽车充电桩机会应视为工程化试点或基础设施项目，而非即插即用目录出口。接单前应确认场站供电、接口、IEC证据、海洋环境耐久性、维护、物流和当地责任。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 索羅門群島電動汽車充電樁機會應視為工程化試點或基礎設施項目，而非即插即用目錄出口。接單前應確認場站供電、接口、IEC證據、海洋環境耐久性、維護、物流和當地責任。
